title: 「Few / Little」句型
titleZh: 「Few / Little」句型 表示「很少／幾乎沒有」
titleEn: Using few and little to express scarcity

omissions: The Important Rules and Benefits explanations are provided in Chinese only; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Few + plural countable noun + plural verb + other information

formulas.labelEn: Few with a plural countable noun
formulas.formula: Few + plural countable noun + plural verb + other information
Little + uncountable noun + singular verb + other information
Subject + verb + few + plural countable noun

example: Few people paid attention to children with special educational needs.
exampleZh: 很少人留意有特殊教育需要的孩子。

examples.zh: 很少學生明白這條規則。

examples.en: I have few close friends here.
examples.zh: 我在這裏只有很少要好的朋友。
examples.highlight: I have few close friends here.

examples.en: Few people paid attention to children with special educational needs.
examples.zh: 很少人留意有特殊教育需要的孩子。
examples.highlight: Few people paid attention to children with special educational needs.

rules.en: Use few before plural countable nouns.
rules.zh: Few 放在複數可數名詞前。
Little 放在不可數名詞前。

rules.en: Few and little normally carry a more negative meaning, indicating that the quantity may be insufficient.
rules.zh: Few 和 little 通常帶有較負面的意思，表示數量少得可能不足。
examples: Few people helped.（幫忙的人很少，可能不夠。）
Little money remained.（剩下的錢很少，可能不夠用。）

rules.en: Few / little and a few / a little have different meanings. Few / little means very few, very little or almost none; a few / a little means some.
rules.zh: Few / little 與 a few / a little 的意思不同。few / little 表示「很少、幾乎沒有」；a few / a little 表示「有一些」。

rules.en: Answers in this exercise use only few or little. Do not add a.
rules.zh: 本練習的答案只使用 few 或 little，不要自行加入 a。

benefits.en: This structure lets you use one short word to state clearly that something exists in a very small or possibly insufficient quantity.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可以讓你只用一個簡短的詞，便清楚表達某種東西「數量很少」或「少得不足」。

benefits.en: It can replace repeated use of not many and not much, making sentences shorter and more natural.
benefits.zh: 它能代替經常重複的 not many 和 not much，令句子更簡潔、更自然。

benefits.en: It also helps you distinguish countable and uncountable nouns, such as few students but little time.
benefits.zh: 它亦能幫助你分辨可數名詞和不可數名詞，例如 few students，但要說 little time。

benefits.en: It is especially useful in essays, reports and discussions of social issues because it can clearly identify shortages of resources, support, time or participation.
benefits.zh: 在作文、報告和討論社會問題時，這個句型特別實用，因為它能清楚指出資源、支援、時間或參與人數不足。

sourceOmissions: The Important Rules and Benefits explanations are provided in Chinese only; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using few or little without changing its meaning.
Use few before plural countable nouns and little before uncountable nouns.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 few 或 little 改寫以下句子，意思必須保持不變。
few 用於複數可數名詞前；little 用於不可數名詞前。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Not many students understood the rule.
questions.promptZh: 明白這條規則的學生不多。
questions.answer: Few students understood the rule.
questions.answerZh: 很少學生明白這條規則。
questions.highlight: Few students understood the rule.

questions.prompt: There was not much milk left in the fridge.
questions.promptZh: 雪櫃裏剩下的牛奶不多。
questions.answer: Little milk was left in the fridge.
questions.answerZh: 雪櫃裏只剩下很少牛奶。
questions.highlight: Little milk was left in the fridge.

questions.prompt: I do not have many close friends in this city.
questions.promptZh: 我在這個城市沒有很多要好的朋友。
questions.answer: I have few close friends in this city.
questions.answerZh: 我在這個城市只有很少要好的朋友。
questions.highlight: I have few close friends in this city.

questions.prompt: We received almost no information about the delay.
questions.promptZh: 我們幾乎沒有收到有關延誤的資料。
questions.answer: We received little information about the delay.
questions.answerZh: 我們只收到很少有關延誤的資料。
questions.highlight: We received little information about the delay.

questions.prompt: Not many buses run after midnight.
questions.promptZh: 午夜後行駛的巴士不多。
questions.answer: Few buses run after midnight.
questions.answerZh: 午夜後只有很少巴士行駛。
questions.highlight: Few buses run after midnight.

questions.prompt: She showed almost no interest in the lesson.
questions.promptZh: 她對這堂課幾乎沒有興趣。
questions.answer: She showed little interest in the lesson.
questions.answerZh: 她對這堂課幾乎沒有興趣。
questions.highlight: She showed little interest in the lesson.

questions.prompt: Not many shops open this early.
questions.promptZh: 這麼早開門的商店不多。
questions.answer: Few shops open this early.
questions.answerZh: 很少商店這麼早開門。
questions.highlight: Few shops open this early.

questions.prompt: He had almost no energy after the long walk.
questions.promptZh: 走了很長的路後，他幾乎沒有力氣。
questions.answer: He had little energy after the long walk.
questions.answerZh: 走了很長的路後，他只剩下很少力氣。
questions.highlight: He had little energy after the long walk.

questions.prompt: Not many chairs were available in the waiting area.
questions.promptZh: 候診區可用的椅子不多。
questions.answer: Few chairs were available in the waiting area.
questions.answerZh: 候診區只有很少椅子可供使用。
questions.highlight: Few chairs were available in the waiting area.

questions.prompt: I did not have much time to finish the report.
questions.promptZh: 我沒有很多時間完成報告。
questions.answer: I had little time to finish the report.
questions.answerZh: 我只有很少時間完成報告。
questions.highlight: I had little time to finish the report.

questions.prompt: Hardly any parents attended the meeting.
questions.promptZh: 幾乎沒有家長出席會議。
questions.answer: Few parents attended the meeting.
questions.answerZh: 很少家長出席會議。
questions.highlight: Few parents attended the meeting.

questions.prompt: The bottle contained hardly any water.
questions.promptZh: 瓶子裏幾乎沒有水。
questions.answer: The bottle contained little water.
questions.answerZh: 瓶子裏只有很少水。
questions.highlight: The bottle contained little water.

questions.prompt: Almost no rain fell last month.
questions.promptZh: 上個月幾乎沒有下雨。
questions.answer: Little rain fell last month.
questions.answerZh: 上個月雨量很少。
questions.highlight: Little rain fell last month.

questions.prompt: Barely any playgrounds are available in this neighbourhood.
questions.promptZh: 這個社區幾乎沒有遊樂場可供使用。
questions.answer: Few playgrounds are available in this neighbourhood.
questions.answerZh: 這個社區只有很少遊樂場可供使用。
questions.highlight: Few playgrounds are available in this neighbourhood.

questions.prompt: Mia knows hardly any people at her new school.
questions.promptZh: 米婭在新學校幾乎不認識任何人。
questions.answer: Mia knows few people at her new school.
questions.answerZh: 米婭在新學校只認識很少人。
questions.highlight: Mia knows few people at her new school.

questions.prompt: We made almost no progress during the first week.
questions.promptZh: 我們在第一個星期幾乎沒有進展。
questions.answer: We made little progress during the first week.
questions.answerZh: 我們在第一個星期只有很少進展。
questions.highlight: We made little progress during the first week.

questions.prompt: Why did the café close early? Not many customers came in.
questions.promptZh: 咖啡店為甚麼提早關門？入內光顧的顧客不多。
questions.answer: The café closed early because few customers came in.
questions.answerZh: 咖啡店提早關門，因為入內光顧的顧客很少。
questions.highlight: The café closed early because few customers came in.

questions.prompt: Why was the room so dark? There was almost no light.
questions.promptZh: 房間為甚麼那麼昏暗？裏面幾乎沒有光線。
questions.answer: The room was so dark because there was little light.
questions.answerZh: 房間那麼昏暗，是因為裏面幾乎沒有光線。
questions.highlight: The room was so dark because there was little light.

questions.prompt: The team had only a small number of experienced players.
questions.promptZh: 球隊只有少量具經驗的球員。
questions.answer: The team had few experienced players.
questions.answerZh: 球隊只有很少具經驗的球員。
questions.highlight: The team had few experienced players.

questions.prompt: Only a small amount of food remained after the trip.
questions.promptZh: 旅程結束後只剩下少量食物。
questions.answer: Little food remained after the trip.
questions.answerZh: 旅程結束後只剩下很少食物。
questions.highlight: Little food remained after the trip.

questions.prompt: The small museum attracted only a small number of visitors.
questions.promptZh: 這間小型博物館只吸引了少量訪客。
questions.answer: The small museum attracted few visitors.
questions.answerZh: 這間小型博物館只吸引了很少訪客。
questions.highlight: The small museum attracted few visitors.

questions.prompt: The doctor gave me hardly any advice about exercise.
questions.promptZh: 醫生幾乎沒有給我任何運動方面的建議。
questions.answer: The doctor gave me little advice about exercise.
questions.answerZh: 醫生只給了我很少運動方面的建議。
questions.highlight: The doctor gave me little advice about exercise.

questions.prompt: Almost none of the students completed the final question.
questions.promptZh: 幾乎沒有學生完成最後一題。
questions.answer: Few of the students completed the final question.
questions.answerZh: 學生中很少有人完成最後一題。
questions.highlight: Few of the students completed the final question.

questions.prompt: Almost none of the soup was left at the end of dinner.
questions.promptZh: 晚餐結束時，湯幾乎一點也沒有剩下。
questions.answer: Little of the soup was left at the end of dinner.
questions.answerZh: 晚餐結束時，只剩下很少湯。
questions.highlight: Little of the soup was left at the end of dinner.

questions.prompt: The village has only a small number of street lights.
questions.promptZh: 這條村只有少量街燈。
questions.answer: The village has few street lights.
questions.answerZh: 這條村只有很少街燈。
questions.highlight: The village has few street lights.

questions.prompt: The project received only a small amount of financial support.
questions.promptZh: 這個項目只獲得少量財政支援。
questions.answer: The project received little financial support.
questions.answerZh: 這個項目只獲得很少財政支援。
questions.highlight: The project received little financial support.

questions.prompt: Almost all the seats were empty during the afternoon show.
questions.promptZh: 下午場次幾乎所有座位都是空的。
questions.answer: Few seats were occupied during the afternoon show.
questions.answerZh: 下午場次只有很少座位有人坐。
questions.highlight: Few seats were occupied during the afternoon show.

questions.prompt: After the notice was edited, almost no useful information remained on it.
questions.promptZh: 通告經過修改後，上面幾乎沒有留下有用資料。
questions.answer: After the notice was edited, little useful information remained on it.
questions.answerZh: 通告經過修改後，上面只留下很少有用資料。
questions.highlight: After the notice was edited, little useful information remained on it.

questions.prompt: The printer was used by only a small number of staff members.
questions.promptZh: 只有少量職員使用這部打印機。
questions.answer: Few staff members used the printer.
questions.answerZh: 很少職員使用這部打印機。
questions.highlight: Few staff members used the printer.

questions.prompt: Hardly any attention was paid to the warning signs.
questions.promptZh: 幾乎沒有人留意那些警告標誌。
questions.answer: Little attention was paid to the warning signs.
questions.answerZh: 那些警告標誌受到的關注很少。

questions.prompt: The teacher said that not many students had checked their answers.
questions.promptZh: 老師說，檢查過答案的學生不多。

questions.answerZh: 老師說，很少學生檢查過答案。
questions.highlight: The teacher said that few students had checked their answers.

questions.prompt: Our group had almost no difficulty finding the station.
questions.promptZh: 我們的小組幾乎沒有遇到困難便找到了車站。

questions.prompt: If not many volunteers arrive, the event may start late.
questions.promptZh: 如果到場的義工不多，活動可能會延遲開始。
questions.answer: If few volunteers arrive, the event may start late.
questions.answerZh: 如果到場的義工很少，活動可能會延遲開始。
questions.highlight: If few volunteers arrive, the event may start late.

questions.prompt: Because there was not much space in the car, we left one suitcase at home.
questions.promptZh: 因為車內空間不多，我們把一個行李箱留在家中。
questions.answer: Because there was little space in the car, we left one suitcase at home.
questions.answerZh: 因為車內空間很少，我們把一個行李箱留在家中。
questions.highlight: Because there was little space in the car, we left one suitcase at home.

questions.prompt: The manager explained that there was hardly any evidence to support the complaint.
questions.promptZh: 經理解釋說，幾乎沒有證據支持這宗投訴。
questions.answer: The manager explained that there was little evidence to support the complaint.
questions.answerZh: 經理解釋說，支持這宗投訴的證據很少。
questions.highlight: The manager explained that there was little evidence to support the complaint.

questions.prompt: Take some snacks because not many food stalls stay open at night.
questions.promptZh: 帶一些小食吧，因為晚上繼續營業的食物攤檔不多。
questions.answer: Take some snacks because few food stalls stay open at night.
questions.answerZh: 帶一些小食吧，因為晚上繼續營業的食物攤檔很少。
questions.highlight: Take some snacks because few food stalls stay open at night.

questions.prompt: The child asked why there was almost no snow on the hill.
questions.promptZh: 那個孩子問山上為甚麼幾乎沒有雪。
questions.answer: The child asked why there was little snow on the hill.
questions.answerZh: 那個孩子問山上的雪為甚麼那麼少。
questions.highlight: The child asked why there was little snow on the hill.

questions.prompt: Only a small number of the old computers still work properly.
questions.promptZh: 只有少量舊電腦仍能正常運作。
questions.answer: Few of the old computers still work properly.
questions.answerZh: 舊電腦中只有很少仍能正常運作。
questions.highlight: Few of the old computers still work properly.

questions.promptZh: 油漆罐蓋打開後，裏面的油漆幾乎都不能使用。
questions.answer: Little of the paint was usable after the lid was left open.

questions.highlight: Little of the paint was usable after the lid was left open.

questions.prompt: The library added only a small number of new books this year.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館今年只增添了少量新書。
questions.answer: The library added few new books this year.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館今年只增添了很少新書。

questions.prompt: Although the school sent several reminders, not many parents returned the form.
questions.promptZh: 雖然學校發出了數次提醒，但交回表格的家長不多。
questions.answer: Although the school sent several reminders, few parents returned the form.

questions.highlight: Although the school sent several reminders, few parents returned the form.

questions.answer: The hospital received little information about the patient’s medical history.
questions.answerZh: 醫院只收到很少有關病人病歷的資料。

questions.prompt: Only a small number of passengers noticed that the platform had changed.

questions.answer: The rescue team had little time to reach the hikers before dark.
questions.answerZh: 救援隊只有很少時間在天黑前到達遠足人士所在之處。
questions.highlight: The rescue team had little time to reach the hikers before dark.

questions.prompt: The report showed that almost none of the local businesses had emergency plans.
questions.promptZh: 報告顯示，幾乎沒有本地商戶備有緊急應變計劃。
questions.answer: The report showed that few of the local businesses had emergency plans.

questions.promptZh: 由於可用資金幾乎為零，社區中心取消了兩個活動計劃。
questions.answer: Since little funding was available, the community centre cancelled two programmes.

questions.promptZh: 調查幾乎沒有提供證據，證明新規則改善了安全情況。

questions.highlight: The survey provided little evidence that the new rule had improved safety.

questions.prompt: Why did the committee delay its decision? It had received hardly any reliable data.
questions.promptZh: 委員會為甚麼押後決定？它幾乎沒有收到可靠數據。
questions.answer: The committee delayed its decision because it had received little reliable data.
questions.answerZh: 委員會押後決定，因為它收到的可靠數據很少。
questions.highlight: The committee delayed its decision because it had received little reliable data.

questions.prompt: Although the city added more recycling bins, only a small number of residents changed their habits.
questions.promptZh: 雖然市政府增設了更多回收箱，但只有少量居民改變了習慣。
questions.answer: Although the city added more recycling bins, few residents changed their habits.
questions.answerZh: 雖然市政府增設了更多回收箱，但只有很少居民改變了習慣。
questions.highlight: Although the city added more recycling bins, few residents changed their habits.
